name: Athena
subtitle: Full Correspondences
summary: Athena is a breath that bridges — Owl; under Jupiter; in Aquarius; with VIII Justice.
flowText: Athena is a breath that bridges — Owl; under Jupiter; in Aquarius; with VIII Justice.

related.name: Lapis Lazuli
related.teaser: Throat is the sounding line—word woven into world.

related.name: ☿ Mercury
related.teaser: Mercury is the quicksilver axis — trickster of thought, breath of inspiration, messenger between…

related.name: Saraswati
related.teaser: Saraswati embodies wisdom, craft, strategy — under Mercury · Jupiter; in Aquarius, Libra.

related.name: Thoth
related.teaser: Thoth embodies wisdom, craft, strategy — under Mercury · Jupiter; in Aquarius, Libra.

related.name: Minerva
related.teaser: Minerva embodies wisdom, craft, strategy — under Mercury · Jupiter; in Aquarius, Libra.

related.name: ♇ Pluto
related.teaser: Pluto is the black sun — furnace of death, seed of rebirth, fire of shadows.

related.name: ♃ Jupiter
related.teaser: Jupiter is the thunder scepter — wheel of fate, king of sky, expansion of spirit.

related.name: Zephyrus
related.teaser: Heart is the vesica of the world — the overlap where differences become devotion.

related.name: Hermes Trismegistus
related.teaser: Throat is the resonant bell — voice of truth, lightning of spirit made sound.

related.name: Sodalite
related.teaser: Throat is the resonant bell — voice of truth, lightning of spirit made sound.

related.teaser: Throat is the resonant bell — voice of truth, lightning of spirit made sound.
